briefs.title: Council to Consider: Survey Results from Burnaby's Online Child Safety Workshop
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council will consider survey results from a November 2025 workshop on combatting online sexual exploitation of children. The report summarizes attendee feedback and suggests topics for future workshops, including online safety, legal system navigation, and gang involvement.
briefs.action_required: Review the workshop topics — if your business serves youth or families, these resources may be relevant to your community role.
